rawAssistant: Before departing in the early hours, make sure your Thornbeast is properly rested and not too strained. We've seen how drills can affect their trust – I'd recommend a thorough check of their bond strain, just to ensure you're not leaving them vulnerable before heading out into the mist-shrouded roads ahead.
